title: tofu-wordpress provider
description: Native OpenTofu/Terraform provider for WordPress installed state (WP-CLI core/plugin/theme), wp-config.php, system cron, and safe content-directory relocation over SSH + WP-CLI. Buildable baseline complete: compiles, unit tests pass (relocation plan builder + wp-config renderer fully covered), gofmt/vet clean, schemas + DESIGN.md done, device-apply logic present but only unit-tested via injected exec.

phases.title: Baseline provider (DONE)
phases.exit_criteria: go build/vet/test/gofmt green; six resources register; imports to 0-diff by design; secrets write-only; relocation staged + rollback-armed.

items.description: os/exec SSH client (key/cert only) + WPCLI wrapper over an injected Executor.
Typed resources, manage-declared-only diff, import-to-0-diff, write-only secrets.
Pure staged plan builder + rollback-armed executor, unit-tested via injected exec.

phases.title: Fleet / hardening parity with install_wordpress.yml
phases.exit_criteria: Every WordPress-side define and cron behavior in the Ansible baremetal playbook is expressible through this provider; node-OS hardening delegated to the host provider with a documented boundary.

items.description: Confirm the full production define set (DISALLOW_FILE_EDIT, WP_AUTO_UPDATE_CORE, WP_POST_REVISIONS, EMPTY_TRASH_DAYS, FORCE_SSL_ADMIN, WP_REDIS_*) round-trips 0-diff through wordpress_config; add any missing raw/string classifications.

DONE: wordpress_cron gains a `mode` attr (wp_cron_php default | wp_cli = `wp cron event run --due-now`, the fleet form) + `wp_binary`; RenderCronEntry/ParseCronMode render+detect both forms so an imported fleet host reconciles to 0-diff. Exact byte-form vs a real fleet cron.d file to be confirmed in the 349 import drill.

DONE (documented decision in DESIGN.md 'Boundary' section): PHP-FPM tiers (fpm_profile) and the broad prod_hardening umbrella (fail2ban, unattended-upgrades, AIDE, rkhunter, Cloudflare allowlists) plus install_path as a whole-install/vhost-DocumentRoot move remain node-OS/fleet concerns owned by the Ansible baremetal role / a future proxmox_host_config resource. The narrow per-site drop-ins (safe_opt, trusted_proxies, enable_hsts) are NOW realized here — see 2.5.

items.feature: netbox-wordpress schema consumption (state enum + login option)
items.description: DONE: wordpress_plugin/_theme `active` bool replaced by `state` (active/present_inactive/absent) matching netbox-wordpress PluginStateChoices, absent=uninstall (fleet cruft removal); generic wordpress_option resource (get/update/delete, import <docroot>#<name>). Hermetic converge/option tests added.

DONE: wordpress_config gains login_slug (installs wps-hide-login + sets whl_page), object_cache_host/object_cache_port (WP_REDIS_* defines + redis-cache install/activate + `wp redis enable`), safe_opt (managed php.ini drop-in: disable_functions + allow_url_fopen Off), trusted_proxies (Apache mod_remoteip drop-in), enable_hsts (Apache mod_headers HSTS stanza, shares the managed Apache conf), and install_path wired via the existing `path`/docroot. Pure renderers in internal/wordpress/hardening.go (RenderPHPHardeningINI/RenderRemoteIPBlock/RenderHSTSBlock/RenderApacheHardeningConf/RedisCacheDefines/LoginSlugOptionArgs/WriteFileCommand) with table-driven tests; hermetic TestApplySiteConfig covers the command sequencing via injected exec (no device). Manage-declared-only: null attr untouched, explicit false/blank removes the managed drop-in. go build/vet/test/gofmt green.

items.feature: integrate_*.yml parity: option json format + mu-plugin file resource
items.description: DONE (ansible intentionally NOT gutted — both paths coexist until validated): wordpress_option gains format=string|json — json manages a serialized plugin-settings array via `wp option update/get --format=json`, canonicalizeJSON normalizes WP's insertion-ordered read-back to sorted-key compact form so a jsonencode() config value is 0-diff (unblocks the 30 integrate_*.yml settings blobs, values from netbox-services IntegrationParam, secrets from OpenBao). New wordpress_muplugin resource writes a wp-content/mu-plugins/<name> file by full content (drift-detected, import <docroot>#<name>) — the home for the Matomo/ntfy/Matrix/Tika/SearXNG/Frappe shim mu-plugins. Pure helpers (validOptionFormat/optionUpdateArgs/canonicalizeJSON/muPluginFile/parseMuPluginImportID) unit-tested; provider now registers 8 resources. `make check` GREEN (go 1.26.4 at /home/jameson/.local/go/bin: go mod tidy + gofmt + vet + test + build all clean). RESIDUAL (still ansible, not yet migrated): multisite core-install + .htaccess, uploads PHP-exec block / dir-listing (webserver-domain), package installs + wp-cli bootstrap + credential minting + periodic maintenance (transients/optimize) + health checks — correctly imperative.

phases.title: Lab-twin relocation drill (verification owed)
phases.exit_criteria: The content_dir relocation is proven end-to-end on a lab WordPress twin through dev-netbox → dev-semaphore, at 0-diff on re-apply, with the health gate and rollback exercised (including an induced failure).

items.description: Stand up a lab WordPress install (CT) reachable by the runner over SSH with key/cert auth; snapshot before the drill.
Relocate wp-content to a new path via Semaphore; verify HTTP 200, keep_symlink, retained original, and a zero-diff re-plan.
Force a health-check failure on the twin and confirm ExecuteRelocation restores WP_CONTENT_DIR and the original directory and releases maintenance mode.

phases.title: Consumer-layer wiring in tofu/
phases.exit_criteria: A tofu/ module maps NetBox WordPressSite / WordPressContentDirectory + netbox-database credential_ref → these resources, driven by prod-semaphore.

items.description: Consumer module reads WordPressSite (docroot, url, core version, plugin/theme set, cron cadence) and WordPressContentDirectory (content_dir/target/uploads/url) from NetBox.
Resolve DatabaseUser.credential_ref → OpenBao and inject DB_PASSWORD + salts as write-only ephemeral values; provider SSH key from the OpenBao SSH-CA.
